description: Controlled vocabulary for the Synapse knowledge base. Every note must carry 1-4 tags drawn from the union of 'domains' (coarse) and 'subtopics' (fine), plus optionally any number of 'context_tags'. The extraction prompt references this file; the validator enforces membership. Slugs are lowercase, kebab-case, and stable once published — adding new slugs is fine, renaming or deleting them is a breaking change.

sustainability-environment.label: Sustainability & Environment
sustainability-environment.description: Climate, biodiversity, circular economy, and the natural environment as the focus of business research.

corporate-social-responsibility.label: Corporate Social Responsibility & ESG
corporate-social-responsibility.description: CSR, ESG disclosure, stakeholder engagement, and corporate sustainability strategy.

business-ethics.label: Business Ethics & Moral Philosophy
business-ethics.description: Ethical decision-making, moral philosophy applied to business, corruption, and ethical climate.

social-entrepreneurship-impact.label: Social Entrepreneurship & Impact
social-entrepreneurship-impact.description: Hybrid organizations, social enterprise, impact investing, and dual-purpose organizing.

diversity-equity-inclusion.label: Diversity, Equity & Inclusion
diversity-equity-inclusion.description: Gender, race, disability, neurodiversity, LGBTQ+, intersectionality, and inclusive organizing.

governance-leadership.label: Corporate Governance & Leadership
governance-leadership.description: Boards, CEOs, executive compensation, political activity, and corporate control.

strategy-innovation.label: Strategy, Innovation & Entrepreneurship
strategy-innovation.description: Competitive strategy, innovation, business models, and new-venture creation.

finance-accounting.label: Finance & Accounting
finance-accounting.description: Corporate finance, accounting, valuation, and sustainable finance.

operations-supply-chain.label: Operations & Supply Chain
operations-supply-chain.description: Production, logistics, supply chains, and sustainable operations.

marketing-consumer-behavior.label: Marketing & Consumer Behavior
marketing-consumer-behavior.description: Marketing strategy, branding, and consumer psychology — including sustainable and ethical consumption.

organizational-behavior-hrm.label: Organizational Behavior & HRM
organizational-behavior-hrm.description: Individuals and teams in organizations — motivation, wellbeing, teamwork, HR practices.

management-education.label: Management Education
management-education.description: Business schools, MBA pedagogy, and the role of management education in society.

economics-public-policy.label: Economics & Public Policy
economics-public-policy.description: Economic policy, institutional economics, and regulation as context for business.

methods-theory.label: Methods & Theory Development
methods-theory.description: Methodological advances, theory-building, and review articles cutting across domains.

context_tags.description: Cross-cutting, always-allowed tags capturing geography, institutional setting, or temporal scope. Use any number (including zero) in addition to the 1-4 domain/subtopic tags.
